description: Executable WooCommerce DB/API performance fuzzer gap report workload over available fuzz/run artifacts using product-local temporary glue that mirrors the intended generic artifact-postprocess contract.
boundary_note: The Woo helper is a temporary local bridge pending upstream Homeboy artifact-postprocess and hotspot primitives. This workload stays executable/declarative until reviewer-facing artifact refs are collected from an approved offloaded run.

compare.rest: registered WooCommerce routes minus generated safe request cases and schema/query attribution rows
compare.database: WooCommerce database inventory and REST DB query profiles minus route, table, option, transient, and lookup attribution rows
compare.performance_hotspots: declared WooCommerce performance hotspot focus areas minus hotspot summary evidence refs

required_refs: reviewer-facing coverage gap report artifact ref

upstream_blockers: Homeboy must own a generic artifact-postprocess primitive for persisted run artifact roots.
Homeboy must own generic hotspot aggregation semantics before Woo-specific ranking labels can move out of rig tooling.
Public fuzz-suite execution must emit reviewer-facing fuzz-suite-result artifacts before this declaration can be proven.
